assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (axios) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 27 lists 'customfield_10632 (Upstream Affected Component) | axios'. overlap-check.md section 4.3.1 (lines 9-10) states: 'TC-8010 has customfield_10632 (Upstream Affected Component) set to axios.' Section 4.3.2 (lines 13-17) constructs JQL query 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "axios" AND key != TC-8010' to search for related CVE Jiras.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 4.3.3 (lines 28-37) explicitly filters by PS Component (customfield_10669: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832: rhtpa-2.2). A filter table shows TC-8008 with 'PS Component Match? YES (pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui)' and 'Stream Match? YES (rhtpa-2.2)' and 'Included? YES'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8008 to find remediation task TC-8009 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 4.3.4 (lines 42-48) states: 'Inspecting TC-8008 issuelinks array for linked remediation Tasks with link type Depend:' and shows a table with Link Type=Depend, Direction=outward, Linked Issue=TC-8009, Summary='Bump axios to 1.9.0 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]'. Line 48: 'Remediation Task TC-8009 found via Depend link.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (1.9.0) against the current CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2) and determines the fix is already covered
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md section 4.3.5 (lines 57-67) presents a comparison table: Current CVE fix threshold >= 1.8.2, Existing remediation task bump version 1.9.0, Comparison '1.9.0 >= 1.8.2', 'Covers this CVE? YES'. Line 67: 'The existing remediation task TC-8009...bumps axios to 1.9.0, which meets and exceeds the current CVE fix threshold of 1.8.2. No new remediation task is needed.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing the issue because existing remediation task TC-8009 already bumps axios past the fix threshold — no new remediation task is created
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 15: 'Recommendation: Close TC-8010 -- the fix is already covered by existing remediation.' Lines 45-46: 'No new remediation tasks are created -- the existing task TC-8009 already covers the fix.' Line 37: Proposed Jira action to transition TC-8010 to Closed with resolution 'Not a Bug'.
